description: NCC 2022 Volume Two test questions for retrieval-only evaluation. expected_provisions are NCC provision IDs that should appear in the top-K retrieved chunks. Designed to cover the major user-facing topics in residential construction.

questions.q: What classes of building are Class 1 — what makes a building Class 1?
What is the minimum ceiling height for a habitable room in a house?
What's the maximum riser height for stairs in a Class 1 building?
Do I need a fall prevention barrier on a deck more than 1m above ground?
Where do I need smoke alarms in a new house?
What waterproofing is required in a bathroom?
What ventilation is required for a bedroom?
What is the minimum window or natural light requirement in a habitable room?
What energy efficiency requirements apply to new houses — what's the heating load limit?
What construction requirements apply in a bushfire-prone area?
What pool barrier requirements apply to a swimming pool?
What weatherproofing is required for an external wall?
What footings and slab requirements apply for a new house?
What does compliance with the NCC actually mean — Performance Solution vs Deemed-to-Satisfy?
What variations apply in Victoria for flood hazard areas?
